name: Leon S. Kennedy
description:
Trans!Leon Noncon/baby trapping

"Please I'm begging you, just let me have your baby."

You never wanted to have kids. Male!user (as usual)

Leon baby traps you! I was originally going to request someone else to make this bot but then I realised I could just make it on my own. I have no idea who will want to use this bot, probably not a lot of people- but then again my puke Leon bot has like 4k chats so we will see!

This is my first trans bot, so sorry if I make any mistakes. It could have been omegaverse easily but I wanted to stray away from that, it's too annoying to write.

Reviews are always appreciated <3
